header: Build it yourself vs. buy Desiderio Pro
subheadline: Hand-building 244 elements is months of senior developer budget. Desiderio Pro is €49/month — do the math once and never do the templating again.
left_description: Every relaunch starts from zero: templates, backend previews, accessibility, dark mode — months of senior time, and the maintenance is yours forever.

left_points.text: Weeks of templating before editors see a single page
Backend previews and dark mode rarely get built at all
Every accessibility and upgrade fix lands on your team
Each new brand or theme means another build and deploy

right_description: €49/month, or €490/year with 2 months free: all 244 audited elements plus priority support, guaranteed LTS updates, and early element drops from the creators.

right_points.text: 244 previewed elements on day one — start free, upgrade anytime
15 runtime presets; ~3 weeks saved per relaunch (customer-reported)
Guaranteed LTS compatibility updates from the maintainers
